error.signature: openai.APITimeoutError: Request timed out. or unexpected truncated response

verdict.summary: OpenAI API timeout is client-side (default 600s). A long response can timeout before completion. Separately, max_tokens silently truncates without error - finish_reason becomes 'length' not 'stop'.

dead_ends.action: Increase client timeout to avoid truncation
dead_ends.why_fails: Timeout and truncation are different issues. Timeout = client gave up waiting. Truncation = max_tokens limit hit. You may have both problems simultaneously.

dead_ends.action: Assume response is complete if no error was raised
dead_ends.why_fails: finish_reason='length' means output was truncated but no exception is raised. You must check finish_reason explicitly.

workarounds.how: if response.choices[0].finish_reason == 'length': # response was truncated, need continuation

workarounds.action: Implement streaming for long responses to avoid timeout
